'''Lamont Bryan''' (born {{birth date|1988|4|12|df=y}}) is a [[Jamaica national rugby league team|Jamaica]] international [[rugby league]] footballer who plays for the [[London Skolars]] in [[RFL League One|League 1]]. Lamont Bryan's usual position is {{rlp|CE}}. He can also operate at {{rlp|fb|WG}}, or {{rlp|sr}}.

==Background==
Bryan was born in Germany to an [[African Americans|African-American]] father, and a Jamaican mother.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.doubletakedebate.com/rugby/lamont-bryan-the-germanjamaican-rugby-star/ |title=Lamont Bryan; The German/Jamaican Rugby Star|accessdate=2013-11-05 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20131105113036/http://www.doubletakedebate.com/rugby/lamont-bryan-the-germanjamaican-rugby-star/ |archivedate=2013-11-05 }}</ref> He was brought up in [[Croydon]], and played his junior rugby league with the [[South London Storm]]. Bryan also plays [[rugby union]] for [[Streatham-Croydon RFC]].

== Featherstone Rovers ==
In January 2013 Lamont was signed by [[Featherstone Rovers]]. Where he made a total of 24 appearances, scoring 6 tries in just one season for the club.

== London Skolars ==
Lamont signed a deal to play for the [[London Skolars]] in 2014.

In 2015, Bryan played for Jamaica in their [[2017 Rugby League World Cup qualification – Americas|2017 Rugby League World Cup qualifiers]].   Just missing out on a finals place.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.skolarsrl.com/?s=lamont |title= Skolars resign rampaging Forward Lamont Bryan}}</ref>

He began his second spell at Skolars in 2017.
